creator: percynicholson9@gmail.com
text:
A broad outline of the process is this:

Head over to https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports https://space-barclicker.com to fork the FreeBSD ports repository.

Duplicate your branch onto a nearby computer.

Make a fresh branch to store your modifications.

To remove yourself as the maintainer, edit the Makefile as needed.

Put your edits into effect.

Save your work and then push it to your GitHub branch.

To access the original FreeBSD ports repository, you need to open a Pull Request.
